articles.author: Alicia Wallace
articles.title: Retail sales post biggest jump in more than 3 years on record spike in gas prices - CNN
articles.description: Americans saw large chunks of their wallets get gnawed away by soaring gas prices in March; however, consumers still had money left in the tank to spend elsewhere.
articles.content:
Americans saw large chunks of their wallets get gnawed away by soaring gas prices in March; however, consumers still had money left in the tank to spend elsewhere.
